summary: Phase 1+2 Testing Complete - Bank Accounts CRUD, Journal Entries, Double-Entry System. 25/25 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Settings Banking tab, Transactions Payment Mode, Books Journal/Ledger tabs.

issues: Settings tab not visible in bottom tab bar - accessed via gear icon in header instead

frontend_issues.notes: Books screen shows Ledger/P&L/Balance Sheet tabs with proper FY date filters. Journal entries are auto-created from transactions and appear in Ledger with proper account grouping.

critical_code_review_comments: All 25 backend API tests passed including Bank Accounts CRUD, Journal entries, Transaction search with payment_mode, individual ledgers
Double-entry bookkeeping working correctly: Income creates Dr. Bank/Cr. Category, Expense creates Dr. Category/Cr. Cash
30 Indian banks list returned correctly from /api/bank-accounts/banks-list
payment_mode defaults to 'cash' when not provided
Deleting a transaction also deletes its linked journal entry

success_rate.frontend: 90% (UI components verified, Settings accessed via header gear icon)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data. Test transactions prefixed with TEST_ were cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2 bookkeeping features fully tested. Backend APIs: bank-accounts CRUD, journal entries with double-entry accounting, individual ledgers with running balance, P&L and Balance Sheet from journal. Frontend: Settings > Banking tab has Add Bank Account with 30 Indian banks dropdown, Transactions modal has Mode of Payment/Receipt dropdown (Cash or Bank accounts), Books screen has Journal/Ledger/P&L/Balance Sheet tabs with FY date filters. All features working as expected.

double_entry_verification.income_transaction: Creates Dr. Bank/Cash A/c, Cr. Category A/c (Nominal)
double_entry_verification.expense_transaction: Creates Dr. Category A/c (Nominal), Cr. Bank/Cash A/c
double_entry_verification.investment_transaction: Creates Dr. Category A/c (Real/Asset), Cr. Bank/Cash A/c
